subcodes.first_line: O thou offshoot of the Tree of Reality! Thou hast been accepted at the court of the true Beloved, admitted at the threshold of the divine Physician, and become a sign of the favors of Sanctified God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع سدره مبارکه از روزی که شما رفته اید همه بفکر شما هستم که در این سفر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Manifestation of God as sun
